rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TO LAI LISA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Deponent To Attend And Estify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents And/Or Tangible Things Described In The Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Deponent To Attend and Testify At Deposition and To Produce For Inspection Documents and/or Tangible Things Described In The Deposition Noticed is granted. There is no merit to the argument that this court has no jurisdiction and that the appointment of an administrator made the noticed deposition beyond the scope of the proceedings. Petitioner's request for sanctions is denied as there is no declaration supporting the amount of any monetary sanction sought. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040] The objections to the purported Verified Statement of Facts are sustained in part and overruled in part as follows: the objections to Paragraphs 2, 4, 11, 16, 17, 19, 22, and 23 are overruled; the objections to Paragraph 3 is sustained; the hearsay objection is sustained as to Paragraphs 7, 8, 9, and 10 are sustained; the hearsay objection is sustained as to the last sentence of Paragraphs 5 and 12. (612/HEWLETT)
